channel.title: Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings

item.title: LINQ Filtering in C#: Where, Any, All, Contains, and OfType
item.description: Learn LINQ filtering in C# with Where, Any, All, Contains, and OfType. Covers compound predicates, null handling, and performance tips with .NET 6-9 examples. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/08/linq-filtering-in-c-where-any-all-contains-and-oftype

item.title: Flyweight Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the flyweight design pattern in C# with practical examples showing shared state optimization, memory reduction, and object pool management. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/08/flyweight-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: LINQ in C#: Complete Guide to Language Integrated Query (.NET 6-9)
item.description: Master LINQ in C# with this complete guide covering filtering, projection, ordering, grouping, joins, and every new operator added in .NET 6 through .NET 10. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/07/linq-in-c-complete-guide-to-language-integrated-query-net-69

item.title: Bridge Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master bridge pattern best practices in C# including interface segregation, testability, DI registration strategies, and avoiding common anti-patterns. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/07/bridge-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability

item.title: C# Regex Replace and Split: MatchEvaluator, EnumerateSplits, and Substitutions
item.description: Master C# Regex Replace and Split with MatchEvaluator delegates, substitution syntax, and .NET 8 EnumerateSplits for zero-allocation text processing. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/06/c-regex-replace-and-split-matchevaluator-enumeratesplits-and-substitutions

item.title: Facade Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: Build a complete facade pattern real-world example in C# with an e-commerce order processing system featuring payment, inventory, and notification subsystems. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/06/facade-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: C# Regex Lookahead, Lookbehind, and Advanced Pattern Syntax
item.description: Master C# regex lookahead, lookbehind, backreferences, and zero-width assertions with practical .NET code examples for advanced pattern matching. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/05/c-regex-lookahead-lookbehind-and-advanced-pattern-syntax

item.title: When to Use Bridge Pattern in C#: Decision Guide with Examples
item.description: Discover when to use the bridge pattern in C# with decision criteria, real-world use cases, and guidance on choosing bridge over simpler alternatives. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/05/when-to-use-bridge-pattern-in-c-decision-guide-with-examples

item.title: Regex.Match, Matches, and IsMatch in C#: Named Groups and Capture Collections
item.description: Learn Regex.Match, Matches, and IsMatch in C# with named groups, capture collections, and .NET 7 EnumerateMatches for zero-allocation matching. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/04/regexmatch-matches-and-ismatch-in-c-named-groups-and-capture-collections

item.title: Facade vs Adapter Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Compare facade vs adapter pattern in C# with side-by-side code examples, key structural differences, and guidance on when to use each. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/04/facade-vs-adapter-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: Measuring Manager Effectiveness -- Can You Even Quantify It? - Dev Leader Weekly 138
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I break down how to think about measuring engineering manager effectiveness across technical, project, and people dimensions. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/04/measuring-manager-effectiveness-can-you-even-quantify-it-dev-leader-weekly-138

item.title: C# Regex Performance: GeneratedRegex, Compiled, NonBacktracking, and Timeout
item.description: Optimize C# regex performance with GeneratedRegex source generation, Compiled vs interpreted modes, NonBacktracking O(n) matching, and timeout for ReDoS prevention. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/03/c-regex-performance-generatedregex-compiled-nonbacktracking-and-timeout

item.title: How to Implement Bridge Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement the bridge pattern in C# with step-by-step code examples covering abstraction hierarchies, implementor interfaces, and DI registration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/03/how-to-implement-bridge-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: C# Regex Patterns for Validation: Email, URL, Phone, and Common Inputs
item.description: Build reliable C# regex validation for email, URL, phone, and common inputs using GeneratedRegex, NonBacktracking, and timeout for production safety. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/02/c-regex-patterns-for-validation-email-url-phone-and-common-inputs

item.title: Facade Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master facade pattern best practices in C# including interface segregation, avoiding god objects, dependency injection, and organized subsystem architectures. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/02/facade-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability

item.title: When to Use Enum vs Constants in C#: Decision Guide
item.description: Struggling with enum vs const in C#? This decision guide covers type safety, extensibility, serialization, and the enumeration class pattern to help you choose correctly. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/01/when-to-use-enum-vs-constants-in-c-decision-guide

item.title: Bridge Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the bridge design pattern in C# with practical examples showing abstraction-implementation separation, composition over inheritance, and clean extensible design. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/01/bridge-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples
